reactablePlus 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Using Config Table with reactablePlus

Include all reactablePlus widget dependencies

Source: R/dependencies.R
useReactablePlus.Rd

Drop this into your UI (e.g. inside fluidPage() or a module's tagList()) to ensure all JS and CSS for picker widgets is loaded at the page level. This is required when embedding pickers inside reactable cells, because reactable's React-based rendering does not process htmltools::htmlDependency objects returned from cell functions.

useSchoolHistory() is a deprecated alias for useReactablePlus(). It will be removed in a future release.

Usage

useReactablePlus()

useSchoolHistory()

Value

An htmltools::tagList of HTML dependencies (invisible in the UI).

Details

Calling this once covers SchoolPicker, AttendancePicker, HomeschoolPicker, NotesInput, and GearPopover. Duplicate calls are harmless (htmltools deduplicates).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
ui <- fluidPage(
  useReactablePlus(),
  reactableOutput("table")
)
} # }
